question: Over motor fuel revenue years 2013-2023, which state (excluding DC) has the 24th-highest average gasoline tax rate? In what year was the candidate representing that specific borough born? Your response should be in the format [Answer].

Result: {Queens, Brooklyn} - the boroughs of the two qualifying candidates
